items.content:
About This Role

We are looking for a Senior Backend Engineer to join our core platform team. You will design and build the services that power our product, working closely with frontend engineers, product managers, and data scientists to deliver scalable solutions that serve millions of users worldwide.

This is a high-impact role where you will influence architectural decisions and mentor junior engineers while shipping features that directly affect our bottom line.

Responsibilities

  • Design, build, and maintain robust backend services using Node.js and Python
  • Architect scalable microservices and RESTful APIs that handle high throughput
  • Collaborate with cross-functional teams to define technical requirements and system designs
  • Lead code reviews and establish best practices for the engineering organization
  • Optimize database queries and improve system performance across the stack
  • Participate in on-call rotations and incident response

Requirements

  • 7+ years of professional software engineering experience
  • Strong proficiency in Node.js, Python, or Go
  • Deep experience with PostgreSQL, Redis, and message queuing systems
  • Proven track record of designing and operating distributed systems at scale
  • Excellent communication skills and ability to mentor others
  • BS or MS in Computer Science or equivalent experience

Nice to Have

  • Experience with Kubernetes and container orchestration
  • Familiarity with event-driven architectures and CQRS patterns
  • Contributions to open-source projects
  • Experience working in a fast-paced startup environment
